artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through his collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His work is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a contemporary approach to electronic music production.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This release includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the sonic tools he employs in his productions.

His artistic output is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, who share an affinity for electronic and dance music styles.
